title: INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY MANAGER
description:
about the company

A premier global investment banking institution dedicated to technological innovation and excellence in global markets. The organization prides itself on a high-performance culture, acting as a strategic partner to front-office operations and delivering sophisticated trading solutions.

about the job

This is a strategic leadership role focused on enhancing global markets technology efficiency and delivering high-quality functional solutions for front-office stakeholders.

  • Evaluate stakeholder requirements to design and develop proposals that optimize global trading platform efficiency.

  • Oversee the functional delivery, implementation, and deployment of flagship trading systems to meet business expectations.

  • Manage comprehensive testing phases, including system integration and user acceptance testing, within formal release cycles.

  • Provide expert support to resolve complex issues related to market data, profit and loss reporting, and trade booking.

  • Serve as a technical advisor to develop long-term domain roadmaps that align enterprise vision with business and technical constraints.

skills and experience required

  • Minimum of 3 years of experience as a business analyst or consultant within a front-office or product control environment.

  • Deep functional knowledge of common traded financial instruments and investment banking workflows.

  • Proven track record in gathering requirements and drafting functional specifications for large-scale financial projects.

  • Prior experience with tier-1 trading platforms and delivering high-quality solutions within a project framework.

Please click on the 'apply' button to apply online. For more information, please reach out to Amrita Chandran. (EA: 94C3609 / R1440037)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED
